tool.name: SameStr Database Builder
tool.description: Build SameStr database from MetaPhlAn or mOTUs markers
tool.command:
mkdir -p '$out_file.extra_files_path'/samestr_db/ &&
#set $db_value = '' #set $db_name = '' #set $db_dbkey = '' #set $version_file_name = ''
#if $db_source.db_type == 'metaphlan'
#set $db_path = $db_source.database.fields.path #set $db_value = $db_source.database.fields.value #set $db_name = $db_source.database.fields.name #set $db_dbkey = $db_source.database.fields.dbkey #set $version_file_name = 'mpa_latest'
#set $json_file = $db_path + '/' + $db_value + '.json' #set $pkl_file = $out_file.extra_files_path + '/samestr_db/' + $db_value + '.pkl' #set $fasta_file = $db_path + '/' + $db_value + '.fasta' #set $fna_file = $db_path + '/' + $db_value + '.fna.bz2' #set $db_version_file = $db_path + '/mpa_latest'
python '$__tool_directory__/customizemetadata.py' transform_json_to_pkl --json '$json_file' --pkl '$pkl_file' &&
#if $os.path.isfile($fasta_file) #set $markers_fasta = $fasta_file #else #set $markers_fasta = $fna_file #end if
samestr db --markers-info '$pkl_file' --markers-fasta '$markers_fasta' --db-version '$db_version_file' --output-dir '$out_file.extra_files_path'/samestr_db/ &&
#else if $db_source.db_type == 'motus' #set $db_path = $db_source.motus_db.fields.path #set $db_value = $db_source.motus_db.fields.value #set $db_name = $db_source.motus_db.fields.name #set $db_dbkey = $db_source.motus_db.fields.value #set $version_file_name = 'db_mOTU_versions'
#set $markers_info1 = $db_path + '/db_mOTU/db_mOTU_taxonomy_ref-mOTUs.tsv' #set $markers_info2 = $db_path + '/db_mOTU/db_mOTU_taxonomy_meta-mOTUs.tsv' #set $markers_fasta = $db_path + '/db_mOTU/db_mOTU_DB_CEN.fasta' #set $db_version_file = $db_path + '/db_mOTU/db_mOTU_versions'
samestr db --markers-info '$markers_info1' '$markers_info2' --markers-fasta '$markers_fasta' --db-version '$db_version_file' --output-dir '$out_file.extra_files_path'/samestr_db/ && #end if
echo '{ "data_tables": { "samestr_db": [ { "value": "'$db_value'", "dbkey": "'$db_dbkey'", "name": "'$db_name'", "path": "samestr_db", "version_file": "'$version_file_name'" } ] } }' > '$out_file'
tool.help: This data manager builds Samestr compatible databases from MetaPhlAn or mOTUS marker files already installed in Galaxy.
